notes: Plan 03 (commit 3873b28) responsive containIntrinsicSize formula DID match actual rendered height per breakpoint but did not eliminate mobile CLS. Layout-shifts audit attributes 0.002356 to GhostLabel itself (~22px movement). Root cause: Anton font swap glyph-metric shift at GhostLabel size band (200px clamp floor) not fully covered by Phase 59 swap descriptors (which were measured against THESIS heading at larger sizes). content-visibility:auto amplifies this transition. Path A accepted (per user direction): LHCI CLS threshold loosened from 0 to 0.005 with explicit Phase 60 rationale. Phase 62 VRF-04 revisits with real-device data + cohort review (D-08) catches perceived issues.

path_a_decision.cohort_review: D-08 chrome-devtools MCP scroll-test fresh-eyes pass
